title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: Horsing around with the Overlords.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a white/black/green or Abzan avatar deck, featuring Lich-Knights' Conquest, Overlord of the Mistmoors, Overlord of the Balemurk and Overlord of the Hauntwoods from Duskmourn in Standard.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

04:28 - Match 1
09:03 - Match 2
20:49 - Match 3
26:19 - Match 4
30:17 - Match 5
32:59 - Match 6
39:07 - Match 7
41:56 - Match 8

Decklist:

videos.title: The ultimate Standard deck.
videos.description:
